notes: The production probe was launched before the checked-in runner gained /usr/bin/time -lp wrapping, so peak RSS is not available in this summary.
The run wrote useful SFINCS diagnostics and printed Goodbye, but the MPI finalization layer returned code 143 after the physical solve.
The case exercises the Brent ambipolar path on a larger W7-X-like analytic geometry and pins repeated operator/matrix setup behavior for the sfincs_jax ambipolar implementation plan.
Scratch logs were intentionally not committed because MUMPS/PETSc output is verbose.
Fortran internal ambipolar timings are much smaller than process wall time in this local probe.
Derivative-assisted options 1 and 3 use forward solves plus an adjoint radial-current solve per Er evaluation.
The geometry1 Brent probe wrote useful diagnostics but reported an MPI_Finalize error after the solve; sfincs_jax should separate solve completion from finalization/profiling failures.

description: Compact Fortran v3 reference summaries and namelist text used by bounded sfincs_jax physics gates.
